name: ThunderGo
description: Telegram File-to-Link Bot — Direct Links & Streaming in Go

TG_API_ID.description: Telegram API ID — get from https://my.telegram.org → API development tools

TG_API_HASH.description: Telegram API hash — get from https://my.telegram.org → API development tools

TG_VAULT_CHANNEL_ID.description: Private vault channel ID (must start with -100, e.g. -1001234567890). Create a private channel, add the bot as admin with Post Messages, forward a message from it to @userinfobot, and paste the ID here.

TG_OWNER_USER_ID.description: Your Telegram user ID — send /start to @userinfobot to get it

TG_MONGO_URI.description: MongoDB connection string (MongoDB Atlas free tier M0 cluster recommended). Format: mongodb+srv://user:pass@cluster0.abcde.mongodb.net/?retryWrites=true&w=majority

TG_URL.description: Leave the default for now. After deploy, Heroku assigns your app a URL like https://APP-NAME.herokuapp.com — run: heroku config:set TG_URL=https://APP-NAME.herokuapp.com

TG_BIND_ADDRESS.description: Must be 0.0.0.0 on Heroku (Heroku rejects loopback binds)

TG_EXTRA_BOTS1.description: (Optional) Extra bot token for higher download throughput — create via @BotFather, add as admin to vault channel. Add more: TG_EXTRA_BOTS2, TG_EXTRA_BOTS3, etc.

TG_KEEPALIVE_SECS.description: Self-ping interval in seconds to keep the free dyno awake (0 = disabled on paid plans)
